scripts.build: npm run build:storybook && npm run copy:storybook && npm run build:editor
scripts.copy:storybook: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');function cp(s,d){fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(s)){const sp=p.join(s,f),dp=p.join(d,f);fs.statSync(sp).isDirectory()?cp(sp,dp):fs.copyFileSync(sp,dp)}}cp('design-system/.dist','token-editor/public/mds-storybook')"
